(Sorry the pic isn’t the best… I don’t like using actual people’s art, so I edit Ai art that I find... but I couldn’t find a picture that I liked that wasn’t obviously Ai or not a fanart.)

WARNING! Male Persona’s only! Sorry girlies, this is Mpreg!

You play as the lead singer of a 5 member all male Idol group who ended up pregnant after a one night stand with one or more of your team members. I don’t really feel like writing out too much here this time since it took so long for me to make this bot. Generally, you don’t know who the father is and neither do they, plus since you are an Idol, you have to find a way to hide the pregnancy from your fans (Or reveal it, it’s up to you.) don’t worry, the bot is much more detailed than whatever I have written here, though the character descriptions are a bit more simple since there are 4 of them, hopefully it will also help the bot keep them in character. If the bot repeats phrases, that is the bot acting up, not because of my writing. It happens in nearly every bot I e played with, mine and others included. I don’t know how to fix it. Also, please use the memory function! It helps a lot. I might change some things about this bot in the future after playing with it if there is anything I know I can fix. Please let me know if any of you run into problems as well, and if you have any bot suggestions, feel free to share them!

Long Intro! I’ll post it here in case you can’t see all of it when starting the character.

(Out of all the Idol groups that were currently popular, yours was upon the best of the best. It was a 5 member group consisting of You, Collin, Aspen, Kayce, and Lloyd, all men. You, were the main singer of the group, your vocals being the best, Collin was the rapper, Aspen, the second main singer, Kayce was the lead dancer, and Lloyd… well, he’s just Lloyd. Everyone was handsome and beautiful, making your group popular with the girls, both young and old alike.

You and your group had just finished a performance abroad, the last show of your first world tour. While you and the others usually lived in Korea, you were all only half Asian, having moved there from different countries. Your agency thought it would be a cool concept to have an entire Idol group of foreigners, some of your songs even having parts in your original languages. Everyone got along nicely as well, your friendly and funny personalities being a hit on talk shows. But even the agency didn’t know about everything; including an event that happened that would cause a huge scandal if it was found out. Let’s just say, you may or may not have had sex with one or more of your group mates after getting drunk one night. But you didn’t remember who it was and no one brought it up since that day.

It was chilly outside as everyone made their way into the lobby of a famous Korean BBQ restaurant. You were finally back in Korea, having flown in the company jet after the concert to save on travel time. You had dark circles under your eyes as you pulled your jacket tight against you to warm up. Recently, you hadn’t been feeling well, puking every so often and not sleeping well at night. Everyone thought it was just due to traveling so much, your body not used to the constant jet lag on top of practices and performances. But, you were determined to finish the tour, and that’s what you did.

As you stepped into the lobby, the smell of pork and spices filled your nose, making your head dizzy and nauseous as you covered your face and leaned against the wall. The others noticed your uncomfortable look as they stopped moving into the restaurant and returned to your side, concerned.

Kayce: "{{user}}? Hey… is everything alright?"

He had placed his hand on your back rubbing circles, but it didn’t help. You felt your vision darkening, your face pale as you began to sway.

Lloyd: "You’re very pale… H…hey!!!"

Your body toppled forwar
